articles.description: IndiaFirst Life's proposed stake sale to BNP Paribas Cardif is delayed. Union Bank of India has exited its corporate agency tie-up with IndiaFirst Life. This development impacts the deal closure and growth visibility. Bancassurance is a key business driver for IndiaFirst Life. Discussions are continuing regarding the renewal of the agreement.

articles.title: Trump-backed Republican Clay Fuller wins election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
articles.description: He will serve out the rest of Marjorie Taylor Greene's term, which ends in January 2027.

articles.title: 32 Indians killed in Ukraine war while serving Russian army
articles.description: 32 Indians have died serving in the Russian military in Ukraine, with efforts ongoing to secure the release of 35 more, amid rising recruitment concerns.

topStories.title: US-Iran Ceasefire: Lindsey Graham says Congress would need to approve proposal to ‘end’ Iran war
topStories.description: President Donald Trump announced Tuesday that he had agreed to suspend imminent attacks on Iranian infrastructure for a period of two weeks, stepping back from earlier threats to target Iran’s “whole civilization”.

topStories.title: Market bets on Aurobindo as Europe, US Sales show uptick
topStories.description: Aurobindo Pharma stock is performing well.  Sales in Europe are improving. New products are launching in the US.  The company is also developing weight loss drugs.  Future growth will come from more product launches and a recent acquisition.  Backward integration projects are also boosting profitability.  The company expects strong earnings growth.

topStories.title: Iran ceasefire deal a temporary win for Trump - but it comes at a cost
topStories.description: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.

topStories.title: SC casts doubt on using ‘untouchability’ to test Sabarimala entry ban
topStories.description: The Supreme Court questioned if "untouchability" applies to menstrual restrictions at Sabarimala, debating the intersection of religious practices and equality.

topStories.title: Trump-backed Republican Clay Fuller wins election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
topStories.description: He will serve out the rest of Marjorie Taylor Greene's term, which ends in January 2027.

topStories.title: US and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire as Trump seizes diplomatic offramp instead of escalation
topStories.description: Iran’s demands for ending the war include control of the strait, the withdrawal of US combat forces from the region, the lifting of sanctions and the release of its frozen assets.

topStories.title: Goldman, BoA, Citadel clash with brokers over options clearing
topStories.description: Big Wall Street firms like Bank of America, Citadel Securities, and Goldman Sachs support a new plan from the Options Clearing. This plan changes how money is collected to cover defaults. Retail brokers, however, fear this will cost them hundreds of millions. The dispute highlights growing friction over risk management as retail trading surges.

topStories.title: Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif posts for first time after brokering ceasefire. Check his full tweet
topStories.description: In a groundbreaking announcement, Pakistan's PM Shehbaz Sharif reveals the US and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire, inviting both nations to Islamabad for peace talks. Read the full text of PM's post.

topStories.title: Supreme court raps Centre over CCTV lapse
topStories.description: The Supreme Court criticised the Centre for sending a low-ranking officer to a meeting on installing CCTVs

topStories.title: White House confirms two-week suspension of strikes on Iran
topStories.description: The White House has confirmed the US has agreed to suspend all bombing and military attacks on Iran for two weeks.

topStories.title: US-Iran Ceasefire: Tehran says it has ‘forced’ Trump to accept its ‘10-point plan’ - What does it include?
topStories.description: A Pakistani-brokered pause on the brink of war has opened a narrow diplomatic window between Washington and Tehran- but Iran's conditions for a lasting settlement are sweeping, and its warnings pointed.

topStories.title: ‘Disturbed, desperate': Congress slams Assam CM, alleges ‘witch hunt’ as cops reach Pawan Khera's house
topStories.description: Congress general secretary Jairam Ramesh termed the police action as a “witch hunt”, claiming it did not follow due process.

dailyNews.title: Brent Crude Falls Over 5% As Donald Trump Agrees To A Temporary Ceasefire With Iran
dailyNews.description: Brent crude dropped 6% to $103, while WTI plunged 15% following a two-week ceasefire agreement and hopes for a reopened Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Oil slides after Trump agrees to conditional two-week Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Trump announced the deal not long before a deadline for a Tuesday evening ultimatum for Iran was reached.

dailyNews.title: US President Donald Trump Calls Off Iran Strikes: Is Strait Of Hormuz Open Now?
dailyNews.description: The US President agreed to a 14-day pause in hostilities, contingent on Iran immediately and safely reopening the critical Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump agrees to pause attacks on Iran if Strait of Hormuz opens
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump says he has agreed to extend his threatened deadline to attack Iran by two weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire With Iran: Here's Full Statement
dailyNews.description: Trump said the decision to suspend military action came following talks with Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir.

dailyNews.title: Trump suspends bombing campaign for two weeks, says Iran's ten-point proposal is workable
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump has suspended the ‘bombing and attack’ on Iran, announcing a two-week double-sided ceasefire after accepting a 10-point proposal from Iran

dailyNews.title: Trump suspends Iran bombing for two weeks following dire threats
dailyNews.description: The US president nevertheless warned that the suspension was dependent on Iran reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: "Subject To Iran Reopening Hormuz": Trump Pauses Strikes For 2 Weeks
dailyNews.description: 'Iran has agreed to complete, immediate opening of Hormuz," says Trump as he pauses strikes for two weeks

dailyNews.title: What we know about Pakistan’s proposed Iran war pause
dailyNews.description: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says diplomatic efforts to resolve the US-Israeli war on Iran are progressing.

dailyNews.description: Iranian musician Ali Ghamsari has been performing outside the Damavand power station in a symbolic protest.

dailyNews.description: The United States said Tuesday it will impose new sanctions on Iran's missile and drone program after its weekend attack on Israel.

dailyNews.description: PM Sharif cites progress in diplomatic efforts for peaceful settlement of war, urges to allow diplomacy run its course.

dailyNews.title: "Any Language...": Rahul Gandhi Slams Trump Over Iran War Threat
dailyNews.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi said any language or action that contemplates the end of civilisation is unacceptable in the modern world and asserted that the use of nuclear weapons can never be...

dailyNews.title: Iranians brace for possible devastation as Trump’s deadline looms
dailyNews.description: Anxiety grips Iran with looming threats of US-led strikes targeting civilian sites, in violation of international law.

dailyNews.title: Democrats call on Republicans to ‘stop this madness’ amid Trump’s ‘a whole civilization will die tonight’ warning
dailyNews.description: The statement comes amid heightened tensions in the Middle East, following Trump’s threat against Iran, and underscores growing calls in Congress for swift oversight and a potential vote to curb the president’s military actions.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo slams Trump’s threat that Iran’s ‘civilisation will die’
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo condemned Trump’s threats that Iran’s “civilisation will die”, calling the remarks “unacceptable".

dailyNews.title: Rahul Gandhi says ‘use of nuclear weapons can never be justified’ after Trump’s ‘civilization will die tonight’ warning
dailyNews.description: Trump’s warning came as a deadline approached for Iran to strike a deal involving the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
